title: AI Image AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: French New Wave minimalist lovers scene, black and white. Couple Dynamic: woman leans slightly toward the man while he looks past her, thoughtful, close but not touching, quiet intimacy through distance and gaze. Setting: empty Parisian side street after light rain, sparse European cinema environment. Wardrobe: her trench coat and knit scarf, his wool coat and open collar shirt, simple and understated. Gesture: her hand almost touches his sleeve but stops short, restrained and believable. Camera: static medium-wide frame with negative space above them, black-and-white film still, soft 1960s 35mm grain and mild gate weave feel. Emotional Tone: unfinished conversation and quiet longing. Restrictions: No color, no glamour excess, no melodramatic kiss, no random text, no modern billboard clutter.
